name: Frederick Delius
abstract: Frederick Theodore Albert Delius (born Fritz Theodor Albert Delius; ; 29 January 1862 – 10 June 1934) was an English composer. Born in Bradford in the north of England to a prosperous mercantile family, he resisted attempts to recruit him to commerce.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Heath
about_quotes.evidence: I’ve been stuck this year listening to Delius, Frederick Delius. He’s like, for lack of another word, I like romantic, I like melodic.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Heath — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
